query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but use the Spalart-Allmaras turbulence model.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but use the Spalart-Allmaras turbulence model.
modification: Change RASModel from kOmegaSST to Spalart-Allmaras.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with a lower laminar flame speed.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with a lower laminar flame speed.
modification: Change Su from 0.434 to 0.35.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a higher laminar flame speed.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a higher laminar flame speed.
modification: Change Su from 0.434 to 0.5.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process for a shorter duration.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process for a shorter duration.
modification: Change endTime from 20e-3 to 15e-3.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but run the simulation for a longer duration.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but run the simulation for a longer duration.
modification: Change endTime from 20e-3 to 30e-3.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a different equivalence ratio.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a different equivalence ratio.
modification: Change equivalenceRatio from 1 to 0.8.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with a fuel-rich mixture.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with a fuel-rich mixture.
modification: Change equivalenceRatio from 1 to 1.2.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a different maximum Courant number.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a different maximum Courant number.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.5 to 0.4.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a finer mesh in the x-direction.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process, but with a finer mesh in the x-direction.
modification: Change the number of cells in the x-direction from 3000 to 4000 in the blocks definition.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with finer mesh in y-direction.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with finer mesh in y-direction.
modification: Change the number of cells in the y-direction from 30 to 40 in the blocks definition.

query: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with more frequent output.
description: Simulate a deflagration to detonation transition (DDT) process with more frequent output.
modification: Change writeInterval to 2e-4.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the c4 equivalent of the explosive to 100 kg.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the c4 equivalent of the explosive to 100 kg.
modification: Change the box dimensions in boxToCell from (0 0 0) (0.5 0.25 0.25) to (0 0 0) (0.63 0.315 0.315) to approximate a larger explosive mass.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with a smaller charge mass of 50 kg TNT equivalent.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with a smaller charge mass of 50 kg TNT equivalent.
modification: Change the box dimensions in boxToCell from (0 0 0) (0.5 0.25 0.25) to (0 0 0) (0.46 0.23 0.23) to approximate a smaller explosive mass.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion for a shorter duration to capture early blast wave.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion for a shorter duration to capture early blast wave.
modification: Change endTime from 0.0005 to 0.0003.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but for a longer duration.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but for a longer duration.
modification: Change endTime from 0.0005 to 0.001.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with a higher Courant number for faster computation.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with a higher Courant number for faster computation.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.5 to 0.6.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with lower adaptive mesh refinement level.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with lower adaptive mesh refinement level.
modification: Change maxRefinement from 3 to 2.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a higher maximum refinement level.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a higher maximum refinement level.
modification: Change maxRefinement from 3 to 4.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with a moderately refined mesh.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with a moderately refined mesh.
modification: Change the number of cells from (10 10 10) to (15 15 15) in the blocks definition.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a finer mesh.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a finer mesh.
modification: Change the number of cells from (10 10 10) to (20 20 20) in the blocks definition.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a different explosive density.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a different explosive density.
modification: In the c4 phase properties, change rho0 from 1601 to 1700.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with less frequent output for reduced storage.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with less frequent output for reduced storage.
modification: Change writeInterval from 1e-5 to 2e-5.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a more frequent write interval.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but with a more frequent write interval.
modification: Change writeInterval from 1e-5 to 5e-6.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with the charge closer to one end.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with the charge closer to one end.
modification: Change the center of the sphereToCell from (0.5 0.5 0.5) to (0.3 0.5 0.5).

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but change the location of the explosive charge.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but change the location of the explosive charge.
modification: Change the center of the sphereToCell from (0.5 0.5 0.5) to (1.0 0.5 0.5).

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but for a shorter duration.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but for a shorter duration.
modification: Change endTime from 0.005 to 0.003.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space for a longer duration to observe late-time effects.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space for a longer duration to observe late-time effects.
modification: Change endTime from 0.005 to 0.007.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a lower Courant number for better stability.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a lower Courant number for better stability.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.3 to 0.25.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but with a different maximum Courant number.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but with a different maximum Courant number.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.3 to 0.4.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but with a finer mesh.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space, but with a finer mesh.
modification: Change the mesh resolution from (20 10 5) to (30 15 8).

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a very fine mesh for detailed resolution.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a very fine mesh for detailed resolution.
modification: Change the mesh resolution from (20 10 5) to (40 20 10).

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a stronger window.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a stronger window.
modification: Change the pBurst value for the 'window' boundary to 100000.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a more fragile window.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with a more fragile window.
modification: Change the pBurst value for the 'window' boundary to 30000.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with obstacles and breakable windows, and set the window's pBurst threshold to 50 kPa.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with obstacles and breakable windows, and set the window's pBurst threshold to 50 kPa.
modification: Change the pBurst value for the 'window' boundary to 50000.

query: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with frequent output for detailed time history.
description: Simulate an explosion in a closed space with frequent output for detailed time history.
modification: Change writeInterval to 5e-5.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building for a shorter duration.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building for a shorter duration.
modification: Change endTime from 0.0025 to 0.002.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but run the simulation for a longer duration.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but run the simulation for a longer duration.
modification: Change endTime from 0.0025 to 0.003.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building with a lower Courant number.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building with a lower Courant number.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.5 to 0.3.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a different maximum Courant number.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a different maximum Courant number.
modification: Change maxCo from 0.5 to 0.4.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a higher maximum refinement level.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a higher maximum refinement level.
modification: Change maxRefinement from 2 to 3.

query: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a more frequent write interval.
description: Simulate the blast wave impact on a building using field mapping, but with a more frequent write interval.
modification: Change writeInterval from 5e-5 to 2.5e-5.

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone for a shorter time period.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone for a shorter time period.
modification: Change endTime from 0.001 to 0.0005.

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but for a different duration.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but for a different duration.
modification: Change endTime from 0.001 to 0.002.

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but disable turbulence simulation.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but disable turbulence simulation.
modification: Change simulationType from RAS to laminar.

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but with a finer mesh.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone, but with a finer mesh.
modification: Change the mesh resolution from (100 50 1) to (150 75 1).

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone with a very fine mesh.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone with a very fine mesh.
modification: Change the mesh resolution from (100 50 1) to (200 100 1).

query: Simulate a moving cone at a lower supersonic speed.
description: Simulate a moving cone at a lower supersonic speed.
modification: Change the velocity in the U file for the cone to (300 0 0).

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone and its shock wave, with the cone moving at 500 m/s.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone and its shock wave, with the cone moving at 500 m/s.
modification: Change the velocity in the U file for the cone to (500 0 0).

query: Simulate a moving cone at a higher hypersonic speed.
description: Simulate a moving cone at a higher hypersonic speed.
modification: Change the velocity in the U file for the cone to (600 0 0).

query: Simulate a high-speed moving cone with frequent output.
description: Simulate a high-speed moving cone with frequent output.
modification: Change writeInterval to 1e-5.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with smaller particles.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with smaller particles.
modification: Change the d value for particles from 1e-3 to 0.5e-3.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment and change the diameter of the particles to 2 millimeters.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment and change the diameter of the particles to 2 millimeters.
modification: Change the d value for particles from 1e-3 to 2e-3.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with larger particles.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with larger particles.
modification: Change the d value for particles from 1e-3 to 3e-3.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment for a shorter time.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment for a shorter time.
modification: Change endTime from 0.001 to 0.0005.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but run the simulation for a longer time.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but run the simulation for a longer time.
modification: Change endTime from 0.001 to 0.0015.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment for a much longer time.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment for a much longer time.
modification: Change endTime from 0.001 to 0.002.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but use a different turbulence model for the gas phase.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but use a different turbulence model for the gas phase.
modification: Change RASModel from kEpsilon to kOmegaSST.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a finer mesh.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a finer mesh.
modification: Change the mesh resolution from (100 1 10) to (150 1 15).

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the initial distribution region of the particles.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the initial distribution region of the particles.
modification: Change the boxToCell dimensions for alpha.particles from (0.05 -1 -1)(0.2 1 1) to (0.1 -1 -1)(0.3 1 1).

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with frequent output.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with frequent output.
modification: Change writeInterval to 5e-5.

query: Simulate the triple point problem for a longer duration.
description: Simulate the triple point problem for a longer duration.
modification: Change endTime from 7e-5 to 1e-4.

query: Simulate the three-point problem, but for a shorter duration.
description: Simulate the three-point problem, but for a shorter duration.
modification: Change endTime from 7e-5 to 5e-5.

query: Simulate the triple point problem with a weaker shock wave.
description: Simulate the triple point problem with a weaker shock wave.
modification: Change the U value in the 'shock' region to reflect a Mach 1.5 shock.

query: Simulate the three-point problem and set the Mach number of the incident shock wave to 2.0.
description: Simulate the three-point problem and set the Mach number of the incident shock wave to 2.0.
modification: Change the U value in the 'shock' region to reflect a Mach 2.0 shock.

query: Simulate the triple point problem with a stronger shock wave.
description: Simulate the triple point problem with a stronger shock wave.
modification: Change the U value in the 'shock' region to reflect a Mach 2.5 shock.

query: Simulate the triple point problem with a moderately refined mesh.
description: Simulate the triple point problem with a moderately refined mesh.
modification: Change the number of cells from (200 100 1) to (250 125 1).

query: Simulate the three-point problem, but with a different mesh resolution.
description: Simulate the three-point problem, but with a different mesh resolution.
modification: Change the number of cells from (200 100 1) to (300 150 1).

query: Simulate the three-point problem, but change the initial position of the high-pressure region.
description: Simulate the three-point problem, but change the initial position of the high-pressure region.
modification: Change the boxToCell dimensions for p from (-1 -1 -1)(0.12 0.6 1) to (-1 -1 -1)(0.15 0.6 1).

query: Simulate the triple point problem with more frequent output.
description: Simulate the triple point problem with more frequent output.
modification: Change writeInterval to 5e-6.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition using the AUSM (Advection Upstream Splitting Method) flux scheme.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition using the AUSM (Advection Upstream Splitting Method) flux scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme from HLLC to AUSM.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but switch the reaction rate model from laminar flame speed (Su) to an Arrhenius-based chemical reaction rate model.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but switch the reaction rate model from laminar flame speed (Su) to an Arrhenius-based chemical reaction rate model.
modification: In combustionProperties, comment out or remove 'Su' and add a 'reaction' dictionary, setting the 'model' to Arrhenius and providing the necessary A and Ta parameters.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but simplify the chemical reaction model to 'infinitelyFast' to study the controlling effect of mixing on combustion.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but simplify the chemical reaction model to 'infinitelyFast' to study the controlling effect of mixing on combustion.
modification: In the 'reaction' dictionary of combustionProperties, change the 'model' from Arrhenius or other models to infinitelyFast.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition with MUSCL reconstruction for higher accuracy.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition with MUSCL reconstruction for higher accuracy.
modification: In fvSchemes interpolationSchemes, change reconstruction limiters from Minmod to MUSCL.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but simplify the thermodynamic model to eConstThermo (constant specific heat) for comparative analysis.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but simplify the thermodynamic model to eConstThermo (constant specific heat) for comparative analysis.
modification: In the 'thermo' dictionary of phaseProperties, change the 'model' to eConst and provide Cv and Hf.
correction_note: The DDT tutorial stores thermo settings in thermophysicalProperties, not phaseProperties.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition with second-order Runge-Kutta time integration.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition with second-order Runge-Kutta time integration.
modification: In fvSchemes ddtSchemes, change timeIntegrator from Euler to RK2SSP.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition using the k-epsilon turbulence model.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition using the k-epsilon turbulence model.
modification: In turbulenceProperties, change RASModel to kEpsilon.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but change the turbulence model from SpalartAllmaras to kOmegaSST.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition, but change the turbulence model from SpalartAllmaras to kOmegaSST.
modification: In the 'RAS' dictionary of turbulenceProperties, change 'RASModel' from SpalartAllmaras to kOmegaSST.

query: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition without turbulence modeling.
description: Simulate a deflagration-to-detonation transition without turbulence modeling.
modification: In turbulenceProperties, change simulationType from RAS to laminar.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with programmed ignition instead of instantaneous detonation.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with programmed ignition instead of instantaneous detonation.
modification: In phaseProperties, add an activation model with programmed ignition settings.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, changing the equation of state (EOS) for the explosive to the BKW (Becker-Kistiakowsky-Wilson) model.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, changing the equation of state (EOS) for the explosive to the BKW (Becker-Kistiakowsky-Wilson) model.
modification: In the 'c4' phase of phaseProperties, change the 'equationOfState' model from perfectGas to BKW and provide parameters like a, b, c, k, x, y, z, alpha, beta, kappa, and theta.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the equation of state (EOS) for the explosive from the default perfectGas to the more realistic JWL (Jones-Wilkins-Lee) model.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the equation of state (EOS) for the explosive from the default perfectGas to the more realistic JWL (Jones-Wilkins-Lee) model.
modification: In the 'c4' phase within phaseProperties, change the 'equationOfState' model from perfectGas to JWL and provide parameters such as A, B, R1, R2, and omega.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion using the LSZK equation of state for the explosive.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion using the LSZK equation of state for the explosive.
modification: In the 'c4' phase of phaseProperties, change the equationOfState to LSZK and provide necessary parameters.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the equation of state (EOS) for air from perfectGas to the stiffenedGas model to better capture gas behavior under high pressure.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the equation of state (EOS) for air from perfectGas to the stiffenedGas model to better capture gas behavior under high pressure.
modification: In the 'air' phase within phaseProperties, change the 'equationOfState' model from perfectGas to stiffenedGas and provide gamma0 and p0 parameters.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but force the equation of state for air to be rhoConst (constant density) to test the system's handling of an incompressible assumption.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but force the equation of state for air to be rhoConst (constant density) to test the system's handling of an incompressible assumption.
modification: In the 'air' phase of phaseProperties, change the 'equationOfState' model from perfectGas to rhoConst and provide a rho value.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion using the HLLC flux scheme instead of Kurganov.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion using the HLLC flux scheme instead of Kurganov.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme from Kurganov to HLLC.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with a simpler gradient scheme.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with a simpler gradient scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes gradSchemes, change from cellMDLimited leastSquares to Gauss linear.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with QUICK reconstruction scheme.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with QUICK reconstruction scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes interpolationSchemes, change reconstruction from vanAlbada to QUICK.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the thermodynamic model for air from perfectGas to a more accurate model based on JANAF tables.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion, but change the thermodynamic model for air from perfectGas to a more accurate model based on JANAF tables.
modification: In the 'air' phase of phaseProperties, change the 'thermo' model from perfectThermo to janaf and provide specie and thermodynamics data.

query: Simulate a free-field explosion with third-order Runge-Kutta time integration.
description: Simulate a free-field explosion with third-order Runge-Kutta time integration.
modification: In fvSchemes ddtSchemes, change timeIntegrator from RK2SSP to RK3SSP.

query: Simulate an internal detonation with progressive damage model for the window.
description: Simulate an internal detonation with progressive damage model for the window.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties, add a progressive damage model to simulate gradual material degradation.

query: Simulate an internal detonation using the AUSM flux scheme.
description: Simulate an internal detonation using the AUSM flux scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme to AUSM.

query: Simulate an internal detonation, but completely disable the window's fracture model, making it an indestructible rigid wall.
description: Simulate an internal detonation, but completely disable the window's fracture model, making it an indestructible rigid wall.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties of phaseProperties, set the 'fractureModel' model to 'none' or remove the dictionary entirely.

query: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's fracture model from the pressure-based pBurst to a principal strain-based model.
description: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's fracture model from the pressure-based pBurst to a principal strain-based model.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties of phaseProperties, remove pBurst and add a 'fractureModel' dictionary, setting the 'model' to principalStrain and providing epsilonMax (maximum strain).

query: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's fracture criterion from the pressure-based pBurst to a principal stress-based model.
description: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's fracture criterion from the pressure-based pBurst to a principal stress-based model.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties of phaseProperties, remove pBurst and add a 'fractureModel' dictionary, setting the 'model' to principalStress and providing sigmaMax (maximum stress).

query: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's material model to viscoElastic to simulate time-dependent deformation behavior.
description: Simulate an internal detonation, changing the window's material model to viscoElastic to simulate time-dependent deformation behavior.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties of phaseProperties, change the 'material' model from linearElastic to viscoElastic and provide parameters like E, nu, and eta (viscosity).

query: Simulate an internal detonation with first-order Euler time integration.
description: Simulate an internal detonation with first-order Euler time integration.
modification: In fvSchemes ddtSchemes, change timeIntegrator from RK2SSP to Euler.

query: Simulate an internal detonation, but change the window's material model from simple linearElastic to elasticPlastic to simulate plastic deformation.
description: Simulate an internal detonation, but change the window's material model from simple linearElastic to elasticPlastic to simulate plastic deformation.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties within phaseProperties, change the 'material' model from linearElastic to elasticPlastic and provide parameters like sigmaY (yield stress).

query: Simulate an internal detonation with an orthotropic material model for the window.
description: Simulate an internal detonation with an orthotropic material model for the window.
modification: In the 'window' boundary properties, change material model to orthotropic with directional properties.

query: Simulate blast wave impact on building using AUSM flux scheme.
description: Simulate blast wave impact on building using AUSM flux scheme.
modification: In building3D fvSchemes, change fluxScheme to AUSM.

query: Simulate blast wave impact on building with third-order time integration.
description: Simulate blast wave impact on building with third-order time integration.
modification: In building3D fvSchemes, change timeIntegrator to RK3SSP.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone using the Kurganov flux scheme.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone using the Kurganov flux scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme to Kurganov.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with velocity Laplacian motion solver.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with velocity Laplacian motion solver.
modification: In dynamicMeshDict, change motionSolver to velocityLaplacian.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with more pressure correctors.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with more pressure correctors.
modification: In fvSolution PIMPLE, change nCorrectors from 2 to 3.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, changing the convection scheme to MUSCL (Monotone Upstream-centered Schemes for Conservation Laws) for higher-order accuracy.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, changing the convection scheme to MUSCL (Monotone Upstream-centered Schemes for Conservation Laws) for higher-order accuracy.
modification: In the 'divSchemes' dictionary of the fvSchemes file, change the scheme for terms like div(phi,U) to 'Gauss MUSCL'.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone using GAMG solver for pressure.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone using GAMG solver for pressure.
modification: In fvSolution solvers, change the p solver from PBiCGStab to GAMG with appropriate settings.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, but change the turbulence model from laminar to the Spalart-Allmaras RANS model.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, but change the turbulence model from laminar to the Spalart-Allmaras RANS model.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties file, change 'simulationType' from laminar to RAS, and add a 'RAS' dictionary setting 'RASModel' to SpalartAllmaras.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, changing the turbulence model from laminar to the classic kEpsilon RANS model.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone, changing the turbulence model from laminar to the classic kEpsilon RANS model.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties file, change 'simulationType' from laminar to RAS, and add a 'RAS' dictionary setting 'RASModel' to kEpsilon.

query: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with realizable k-epsilon turbulence model.
description: Simulate a hypersonic moving cone with realizable k-epsilon turbulence model.
modification: In turbulenceProperties, change RASModel to realizableKE.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, explicitly specifying the thermal conductivity model for the particle phase as the Gidaspow model.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, explicitly specifying the thermal conductivity model for the particle phase as the Gidaspow model.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, change the 'conductivityModel' from Syamlal or its default to Gidaspow.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the particle diameter model from 'constant' to 'reactingParticle' to simulate particle size changes due to chemical reactions.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the particle diameter model from 'constant' to 'reactingParticle' to simulate particle size changes due to chemical reactions.
modification: In the 'diameter' sub-dictionary of phaseProperties, change the 'model' from constant to reactingParticle.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the drag model to the Ergun model, which is suitable for dense particle flows.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the drag model to the Ergun model, which is suitable for dense particle flows.
modification: In the 'drag' sub-dictionary of phaseProperties, change the 'model' from SchillerNaumann to Ergun.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the drag model between gas and particles from SchillerNaumann to the Gidaspow model.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the drag model between gas and particles from SchillerNaumann to the Gidaspow model.
modification: In the phaseProperties file, within the 'drag' sub-dictionary, change the 'model' from SchillerNaumann to Gidaspow.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment using HLLC flux scheme.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment using HLLC flux scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme to HLLC.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and introduce the Johnson frictional pressure model to account for contact forces in quasi-static, dense particle states.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and introduce the Johnson frictional pressure model to account for contact forces in quasi-static, dense particle states.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, add a 'frictionalPressureModel' dictionary and set the 'model' to Johnson.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and introduce the Schaeffer frictional viscosity model for the particle phase to better describe stresses in dense particle flows.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and introduce the Schaeffer frictional viscosity model for the particle phase to better describe stresses in dense particle flows.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, add a 'frictionalViscosityModel' dictionary and set the 'model' to Schaeffer.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and change the granular pressure model from Syamlal to the model by Lun et al.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and change the granular pressure model from Syamlal to the model by Lun et al.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, change the 'granularPressureModel' from Syamlal to Lun.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the viscosity model for the particle phase from Syamlal to the Hrenya-Sinclair model.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the viscosity model for the particle phase from Syamlal to the Hrenya-Sinclair model.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, change the 'viscosityModel' from Syamlal to HrenyaSinclair.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the interfacial heat transfer model to the Gunn model.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the interfacial heat transfer model to the Gunn model.
modification: In the 'heatTransfer' sub-dictionary of phaseProperties, set the 'model' to Gunn.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and specify the interfacial heat transfer model as RanzMarshall.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, and specify the interfacial heat transfer model as RanzMarshall.
modification: In the phaseProperties file, within the 'heatTransfer' sub-dictionary, set the 'model' to RanzMarshall.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the calculation method for interfacial pressure to a model based on volume fraction averaging.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the calculation method for interfacial pressure to a model based on volume fraction averaging.
modification: In the 'interfacialPressure' sub-dictionary of phaseProperties, change the 'model' from specifiedPhase to volumeFractionAverage.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the calculation method for interfacial velocity from the default specifiedPhase to mass-weighted averaging (massAveraged).
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, changing the calculation method for interfacial velocity from the default specifiedPhase to mass-weighted averaging (massAveraged).
modification: In the 'interfacialVelocity' sub-dictionary of phaseProperties, change the 'model' from specifiedPhase to massAveraged.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a higher particle packing limit.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a higher particle packing limit.
modification: In phaseProperties, change the particle packing limit from default to 0.65.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the radial distribution function model used for calculating particle collision probability to SinclairJackson.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment, but change the radial distribution function model used for calculating particle collision probability to SinclairJackson.
modification: In the turbulenceProperties.particles file, change the 'radialModel' from Lun or its default to SinclairJackson.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a higher coefficient of restitution.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with a higher coefficient of restitution.
modification: In phaseProperties, change the particle-particle restitution coefficient to 0.9.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with smoothSolver for all fields.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment with smoothSolver for all fields.
modification: In fvSolution solvers, change solver type to smoothSolver with GaussSeidel smoother for improved convergence.

query: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment using k-omega turbulence model for gas.
description: Simulate an explosion in a dusty environment using k-omega turbulence model for gas.
modification: In turbulenceProperties.gas, change RASModel from kEpsilon to kOmega.

query: Simulate the triple point problem using the AUSM flux scheme.
description: Simulate the triple point problem using the AUSM flux scheme.
modification: In fvSchemes, change fluxScheme to AUSM.

query: Simulate the triple point problem with MUSCL reconstruction.
description: Simulate the triple point problem with MUSCL reconstruction.
modification: In fvSchemes interpolationSchemes, change reconstruction from vanAlbada to MUSCL.

query: Simulate the triple point problem, but change the convection scheme to the classic first-order Lax-Friedrichs scheme to observe its high-dissipation effect on shocks.
description: Simulate the triple point problem, but change the convection scheme to the classic first-order Lax-Friedrichs scheme to observe its high-dissipation effect on shocks.
modification: In the 'divSchemes' dictionary of the fvSchemes file, change the scheme for terms like div(phi,U) to 'Gauss Lax-Friedrichs'.

query: Simulate the triple point problem, but change the flux limiter from the default vanAlbada to vanLeer to test its effect on shock resolution.
description: Simulate the triple point problem, but change the flux limiter from the default vanAlbada to vanLeer to test its effect on shock resolution.
modification: In the 'divSchemes' dictionary of the fvSchemes file, change the flux limiter for terms like div(phi,U) from vanAlbada to vanLeer.
